channel.title: Forum Mathematicum
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Forum Mathematicum

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Some properties of extended frame measure
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0412

item.title: Orthogonal separation of variables for spaces of constant curvature
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0300

item.title: Fundamental properties of Cauchy–Szegő projection on quaternionic Siegel upper half space and applications
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2024-0049

item.title: Uniform bounds for Kloosterman sums of half-integral weight with applications
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0201

item.title: q-supercongruences from Watson's 8φ7 transformation
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0409

item.title: Submodules of normalisers in groupoid C*-algebras and discrete group coactions
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0182

item.title: Explicit bounds for the solutions of superelliptic equations over number fields
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0381

item.title: The existence of optimal solutions for nonlocal partial systems involving fractional Laplace operator with arbitrary growth
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0265

item.title: A Kollár-type vanishing theorem for k-positive vector bundles
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0332

item.title: New sequence spaces derived by using generalized arithmetic divisor sum function and compact operators
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0138

item.title: On the Iwasawa main conjecture for generalized Heegner classes in a quaternionic setting
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0141

item.title: A p-adic analog of Hasse--Davenport product relation involving ϵ-factors
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0347

item.title: On arithmetic quotients of the group SL2 over a quaternion division k-algebra
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0422

item.title: Euler’s integral, multiple cosine function and zeta values
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0426

item.title: Paley inequality for the Weyl transform and its applications
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0302

item.title: Homogeneous ACM and Ulrich bundles on rational homogeneous spaces
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2023-0383

item.title: Arithmetic progression in a finite field with prescribed norms
item.description: Article by Kaustav Chatterjee, Hariom Sharma, Aastha Shukla, Shailesh Kumar Tiwari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/forum-2024-0026
